entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `color` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `uri` TEXT NOT NULL, `display_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `size` INTEGER NOT NULL, `last_modified` INTEGER NOT NULL, `collection_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `processed` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_screenshot_collection_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_screenshot_collection_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`collection_id`)

indices.name: index_screenshot_uri
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_screenshot_uri` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uri`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `content_text` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`id`) REFERENCES `screenshot`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `screenshot_content` BEGIN DELETE FROM `fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `screenshot_content` BEGIN DELETE FROM `fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `screenshot_content` BEGIN INSERT INTO `fts`(`docid`, `content_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content_text`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `screenshot_content` BEGIN INSERT INTO `fts`(`docid`, `content_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content_text`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`content_text` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`screenshot_content`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
